headline: Why The Centrica (LSE:CNA) Narrative Is Shifting As Analysts Reassess Upside And Risks
summary: Centrica’s fair value estimate has been nudged higher from £2.02 to £2.05, and several brokers have also lifted their price targets into roughly the 210 GBp to 232 GBp range. That shift lines up with a research split where bullish analysts point to low carbon generation and gas exposure, while more cautious voices question how much upside is left after the recent share price recovery and buyback completion. As you read on, you will see how these moving targets shape the evolving Centrica...

headline: Citigroup Dubai Evacuation Puts Operational Risks And Valuation In Focus
summary: Citigroup (NYSE:C) has instructed staff in its Dubai offices to evacuate and work remotely until further notice. The decision follows reported threats from Iran targeting Western banks operating in the Middle East. The move represents a major operational shift for Citi in a key regional hub, driven by heightened security concerns. Citigroup is a global bank with a large institutional and corporate client base, and the Middle East plays a role in its cross border financing, trading, and...

headline: Dow Inc. (DOW) Surges 9.3% as Citi Hikes Price Target by 43%
